name: mena-job-command-center
description: Design-prototype PWA for a MENA-focused job-search command center. The UI is Arabic-first, RTL, mobile-first, and served by a small Rust/Axum backend.

scripts.check:all: npm run check:contract && npm run check:js && npm run check:functions
scripts.deploy: npm run check:all && wrangler pages deploy public --project-name jobs-wasfai --commit-dirty=true
